name: Drink Potion
description: a bubbly gulp-and-sparkle of drinking a potion

ai.prompt: Drinking a potion: a cork pop, several liquid glugs of swallowing, then a soft magical restorative shimmer. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
